title: chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. humilis
intro: Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. humilis, also known as Bigelow sagebrush, is a small shrub native to the western United States, characterized by its low-growing, spreading habit and grayish-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
